CVE-2010-4334.title: The IO::Socket::SSL module 1.35 for Perl, when verify_mode is not ...
CVE-2010-4334.description: The IO::Socket::SSL module 1.35 for Perl, when verify_mode is not VERIFY_NONE, fails open to VERIFY_NONE instead of throwing an error when a ca_file/ca_path cannot be verified, which allows remote attackers to bypass intended certificate restrictions.
